metadata.description: P2 — novel-brainstorm and novel-review-master embedded presets
metadata.qc: PM-validated Approve. 0 Critical, 0 Warning, 0 Suggestion. Narrow scope, all 8 P2 tests pass, all regression tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.
metadata.qa: skipped — PM-validated path for narrow-scope plan with strong evidence
shipped: novel-brainstorm/preset.yaml + 5 prompts (gather-findings, gather-exit, synthesize-ideas, synthesize-exit, synthesize-ctx-update)
novel-brainstorm exit_when: kind llm_judge (auto-chain compatible per P0.5 W-1 fix)
novel-review-master exit_when: kind manual (human-in-loop master decision)
Both presets use preset: + gates: + run_intents: shape (R-V137P0-01 compliant)
Both presets consume open_findings via preset.input.open_findings (consumed by gather/present states)
Validation tests in preset/mod.rs (4 tests covering list inclusion + load+validate for both presets)
E2E smoke tests in tests/novel_brainstorm_review_master.rs (8 tests covering AC1..AC3 + happy paths + exit-when verification)
CLI hints documented in embedded-presets/README.md §Quality Loop Presets with daemon schedule add examples
